name: content-generation
description: Standalone Codex plugin for premium tenant-local content-generation workflows, starting with LinkedIn infographic production.

interface.longDescription: Package reusable Codex skills for premium tenant-local content-production workflows. Version one includes an optional normalize-brand utility and a generate-infographic workflow that works directly from tenant brand materials.
defaultPrompt: Clean up or clarify this tenant brand folder when the materials are messy
Generate a premium LinkedIn infographic using this tenant folder and source text
Use the content-generation plugin to generate visual assets directly from tenant brand materials
